env.description: Guild ID to register module slash commands in (omit for global commands)
Discord channel snowflake for the standing #auth-queue message (social-auth)
Bearer token for the Fedica API (social-auth) — stub mode active without this
Override Fedica base URL (social-auth, default: https://api.fedica.com/api)
Anthropic API key for AI risk assessment (social-auth) — stub mode active without this
Claude model ID for risk assessment (social-auth, e.g. claude-sonnet-5)
Vector store URL for policy RAG retrieval (social-auth)
Discord channel for the standing #comms-cal days-of-significance embed
YouTube channel ID to poll for new uploads (youtube-announcements)
Discord channel to post new-video announcements in (youtube-announcements)
Discord channel for the standing Upcoming Event Schedule embed (events-calendar)
Role pinged on event created/changed and 15-min-before reminders (events-calendar)
The 'Fusion Public & Member Events' Google Calendar ID (events-calendar)
Read-only Google Calendar API key (events-calendar) — write direction not yet implemented; see TODO in governance/events-calendar/googleCalendar.ts
